confidence.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
confidence.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: sign-guard, inject-guard, secret-scan · Private data: x402-trust-audit, tool-call-guard, secret-scan · Public sink: sign-guard, inject-guard, tool-call-guard, secret-scan · Destructive: tool-call-guard.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: sign-guard, inject-guard, secret-scan · Private data: x402-trust-audit, tool-call-guard, secret-scan · Public sink: sign-guard, inject-guard, tool-call-guard, secret-scan · Destructive: tool-call-guard

confidence.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
